name: Heliox Crystal Technician
resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

trait.name: Volatile Cargo
entries: When the Heliox Crystal Technician drops to 0 hit points, crystalline shrapnel bursts from its body. Each creature within 10 feet must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 ({@damage 3d6}) force damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Heliox Crystal Technician makes two Shard Knife attacks, or one Shard Knife attack and uses Crystal Scatter.

action.name: Shard Knife
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) force damage.

action.name: Crystal Scatter
entries: Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 ({@damage 4d6}) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. A creature that fails also has its speed reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.
